layers.label: County
layers.rank_note: IL county (102 statewide; TIGERweb, live-verified 2026-07)

layers.label: High School District
layers.rank_note: IL secondary school district (105 statewide; only where elem/HS pairs exist)

layers.label: Unified School District
layers.rank_note: IL unified school district (387 statewide incl. CPS as SD 299)

layers.label: Elementary School District
layers.rank_note: IL elementary school district (371 statewide)

layers.label: Township / County Subdivision
layers.rank_note: IL county subdivision (1,695 statewide: townships + city/precinct MCDs)

layers.label: Municipality
layers.rank_note: IL incorporated place (1,294 statewide; empty card = unincorporated)

layers.label: Judicial Subcircuit (12th Circuit)
layers.rank_note: Will County judicial subcircuit (5; PA 102-0693 Judicial_Districts_2022, coverage-gated)

layers.label: Judicial Subcircuit (18th Circuit)
layers.rank_note: DuPage judicial subcircuit (7; PA 102-0693, the 18th Judicial Circuit's subcircuits, live from county GIS, coverage-gated to DuPage). Ranked beside will-county-judicial (the analogous collar-county layer); the two never co-render, being gated to different counties.

layers.label: County Board District
layers.rank_note: Consolidated county-legislature layer — Cook Commissioner (17) + Will (11) + DuPage (6) board districts as per-county dispatch entries of one toggle (docs/COUNTY_LAYER_CONSOLIDATION.md); coverage-gated to the union of its counties

layers.label: Cook County Board of Review District
layers.rank_note: Cook County Board of Review district (only 3, county-wide)

layers.label: Fire Protection District
layers.rank_note: Will County fire protection district (37; trustees live from county GIS, coverage-gated)

layers.label: DuPage Fire Protection District
layers.rank_note: DuPage fire protection district (30; partial coverage, live from county GIS, coverage-gated to DuPage; GIS carries no trustee/contact fields, so name-only). Ranked beside will-county-fire (the analogous collar-county layer); the two never co-render, being gated to different counties.

layers.label: DuPage Special Police District
layers.rank_note: DuPage special police district (4; unincorporated-area township police-tax districts that fund supplemental DuPage County Sheriff patrol — Bloomingdale/Milton/Wayne/York townships; partial coverage, live from county GIS, coverage-gated to DuPage). DuPage-specific — no Will analog.

layers.label: Park District
layers.rank_note: Will County park district (22; partial coverage, commissioners from county GIS, coverage-gated)

layers.label: DuPage Park District
layers.rank_note: DuPage park district (39; partial coverage, live from county GIS, coverage-gated to DuPage; GIS carries no commissioner/contact fields, so name-only). Ranked beside will-county-park (the analogous collar-county layer); the two never co-render, being gated to different counties.

layers.label: Elected School Board District
layers.rank_note: Elected School Board district (10, citywide)

layers.label: CPS Network (High School, admin office)
layers.rank_note: CPS High School Network (admin grouping)

layers.label: CPS Network (K-8, admin office)
layers.rank_note: CPS K-8 Network (admin grouping)

layers.label: City Ward
layers.rank_note: City Ward (50)

layers.label: Ward Precinct
layers.rank_note: Ward Precinct (sub-selection of City Ward)
rank_comment: Smaller than its parent ward, so it renders on top (smallest-on-top); turning it
on drops the ward to outline-only, framing the precinct fills from underneath.

layers.label: Police District
layers.rank_note: Police District (22)

layers.label: Police Beat
layers.rank_note: Police Beat (~277)
rank_comment: Smaller than its parent district, so it renders on top (smallest-on-top);
turning it on drops the district to outline-only, framing the beat fills from underneath.

layers.label: CCPSA District Council
rank_comment: CCPSA District Council shares the police-district geometry exactly (22,
one council per district); place it just after so its outline draws on
top when both are on and its distinct teal dash stays legible.

layers.label: Community Area
layers.rank_note: Community Area (77)

layers.label: ZIP Code
layers.rank_note: ZIP Code (statewide Census ZCTA; ZCTA ≈ USPS ZIP)

layers.rank_note: High School attendance zone

layers.label: CPS Middle School Zone
layers.rank_note: Middle School attendance zone

rank_comment: Smallest Will County layer, so it renders on top of Township and County
(smallest-on-top); turning it on drops both to outline-only, framing the

layers.label: Voting Precinct
layers.rank_note: DuPage voting precinct (600; current 2024 consolidated map Precincts_2024, coverage-gated to DuPage). Ranked beside will-county-precinct (the analogous collar-county layer); the two never co-render, being gated to different counties.
rank_comment: Smallest DuPage layer, so it renders on top of Township and County
(smallest-on-top); turning it on drops both to outline-only, framing the

layers.label: CPS Elementary School Zone
layers.rank_note: Elementary School attendance zone — smallest polygon layer

layers.label: School Location (all, incl. private, nearest N)
layers.rank_note: individual school-campus footprints — smallest polygons, above the zones

layers.label: Police Station
layers.rank_note: point marker — no polygon area, always topmost

layers.label: Fire Station
layers.rank_note: point marker — no polygon area, always topmost

layers.label: Post Office
layers.rank_note: point marker — no polygon area, always topmost

layers.label: Library
layers.rank_note: point marker — no polygon area, always topmost

layers.label: Early Voting Site
layers.rank_note: point marker — no polygon area, always topmost

layer_count_note: 17 base + police-beat (#43) + school-site (#45) + ccpsa-district-council + ward-precinct + 6 statewide local-gov layers (county, township, municipality, school districts x3 — TIGERweb) + 1 consolidated county-board (Cook commissioner + Will + DuPage, county-dispatched) + 4 Will County layers (judicial, fire, park, precinct — coverage-gated) + 5 DuPage County layers (judicial, fire, special-police, park, precinct — coverage-gated) + 3 amenity nearest-point layers (post-office, library, early-voting) = 40 — live-verified 2026-07

negative_point.note: Lake Michigan, Indiana waters — outside all three anchor layers

geometry.note: 17 IL U.S. House districts + a ZZ water pseudo-district; pre-built from TIGERweb by scripts/build_legislative_boundaries.py (R2-2)
59 IL Senate districts + ZZ; pre-built from TIGERweb layer 1
118 IL House districts + ZZ; pre-built from TIGERweb layer 2

rosters.note: ships as an empty placeholder until its first scrape lands
22 councils (13 & 21 retired); floor guards a partial scrape
11 board districts (2 members each) scraped weekly from willcountyboard.com
GeoJSON FeatureCollection (type/metadata/features — key floor is shape-only); hand-curated per election from chicagoelections.gov, network-first so a new election's list is never served stale

data_sources.note: The machine-checked source manifest (Socrata ids, shapefile provenance, live endpoints, year-search patterns) lives in the freshness gate, which already guards manifest<->app drift monthly. A second copy here would drift against it.

workflows.purpose: CPD district info (Cloudflare-challenged scrape via Playwright)
Board of Review commissioner roster (cookcountyboardofreview.com scrape)
Illinois county clerk roster (ISBE election-authority directory scrape)
DuPage County Board roster (dupagecounty.gov directory scrape)
source freshness + redistricting watch (opens/updates one tracking issue)
